TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjuletevetevek, title = Tjuletevetevek, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjuletevetevek} }

S.FORM: alang Tjuletevetevek ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 90 buwan, 268 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 258 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Tjuletevetevek ga Kaaluan ru Tjuluuai. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuletevetevek ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjuletevetevek ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tjuletevetevek ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 90 buwan, 268 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 258 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Tjuletevetevek ga Kaaluan ru Tjuluuai. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuletevetevek ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjuletevetevek ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjulete*ete*ek ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na tjulete*ete*ek ɣa kaaluan ru tjuluuai. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tjulete*ete*ek ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tjulete*ete*ek ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
